differentials.name: "Phantom breast tumor" = simulated mass (a)  asymmetric density
differentials.raw: "Phantom breast tumor" = simulated mass (a)  asymmetric density

context: √  scalloped concave breast contour √  interspersed fatty elements (b)  summation artifact = chance overlap of normal glandular breast structures √  failure to visualize "tumor" on more than one view √  sharp halo / fissured appearance (b)  Skin calcifications √  lucent center (= clue) √  superficial location (tangential views) (c)  Sebaceous / epithelial inclusion cyst (d)  Neurofibromatosis (e)  Biopsy scar Frequency:   5.4% for intramammary nodes Location:   axilla, subcutaneous tissue of axillary tail, lateral portion of pectoralis muscle, intramammary (typically in upper outer quadrant) √
